response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; there is no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols as required, and cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK without Azure or embedded system security context.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver complex distributed systems
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage in professional context
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
Lacks exposure to MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or real-time embedded systems
